items.title: Copy of Griezmann is already an Atlético legend. Can he wi...
items.summary: Antoine Griezmann has never won LaLiga or the Champions League, but he's still among the greats. Can he sign off with club soccer's biggest title?
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Jack Draper out of French Open with knee injury
items.summary: Jack Draper has been ruled out of the French Open with a knee injury in another blow for the world No. 4's attempts to get back to fitness.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Travishek, Klaasen outmuscle MI as SRH chase 244 for fifth straight win
items.summary: Rickelton's 123* took MI to their highest first-innings total in the IPL but it was chased down with relative ease
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
